headline: A Look At Microchip Technology (MCHP) Valuation After Strong Earnings Beat And Upbeat Guidance
summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) is back in focus after reporting fourth quarter and full year results that beat expectations, issuing upbeat guidance, and combining this with product launches, expansion projects, and a fresh quarterly dividend. See our latest analysis for Microchip Technology. The latest earnings beat and guidance appear to have reset expectations, with a 30 day share price return of 50.47% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 112.90% suggesting strong momentum after a weaker...
